meta.title: NurseAda – Ya 24/7 Health Helper
meta.description: AI health support for Nigeria and Africa. Symptom check, medicine, and health talk for your language.

home.subtitle: Ya 24/7 AI health helper for Nigeria and Africa. Check symptoms, find medicine, and get support for your language.

account.title: Account
account.patientIdHelp: Use this Patient ID when you wan contact support. E no go give person access to ya records.

profile.title: Profile
profile.guestTitle: Sign in make you see your profile
profile.guestBody: See your Patient ID, change language, sign out when you don.

chat.title: Yarn with NurseAda
chat.emptyState: Tell me how you dey feel, ask about medicine, or get health advice. If e be emergency, call 112 or go hospital sharp sharp.
chat.placeholder: Tell me how you dey feel or ask health question...
chat.medicalSourceLabel: Optional: link to trusted health page (WHO, NHS, CDC…)
chat.medicalSourceHint: You need log in. We go fetch public page text to improve answer — no be medical advice.
chat.feedbackWithSourceThanks: Thank you — we don save your feedback and the source.
chat.serverError: I no fit reach the server. Check say the gateway dey run and the URL for .env.local correct.
chat.guestMode: Guest mode — log in to see patient data
chat.promptFever: I get fever and I dey tired
chat.promptDrugCombo: I fit take paracetamol with ibuprofen?
chat.promptCough: Wetin I go do for cough?
chat.promptDka: I get ketones and my sugar dey high
chat.promptHerbalNausea: Any local remedy for belle wahala?
chat.promptPregnancy: Bitter leaf safe for person wey get belle?
chat.attachSubtitle: Choose where the medical picture go come from
chat.photoPermission: Abeg allow access to ya photos to attach medical picture.
chat.cameraPermission: Abeg allow camera access to snap photo of symptom or scan.
chat.authBannerTitle: Save ya progress and set reminder
chat.authBannerBody: Create free account to save ya chat, book appointment, and set medicine reminder.

remedies.title: Local Remedies
remedies.subtitle: Natural options wey get evidence for common sickness
remedies.noResults: No remedy match wetin you search. Try different word.
remedies.disclaimer: These ones na complementary option, e no suppose replace normal hospital treatment. Always tell your doctor about any local remedy wey you dey use, especially if you dey take medicine. If emergency, go hospital sharp sharp.

medications.title: Medicine
medications.subtitle: Manage ya medicine reminder and check drug interaction
medications.signInReminders: Log in to create and manage medicine reminder.
medications.noRemindersHint: Add one make you no forget your medicine.
medications.interactionLabel: Enter medicine to check for interaction
medications.noInteractions: No wahala dey between these medicines.
medications.minTwoDrugs: Enter at least two medicines to check for interaction.
medications.disclaimer: This one na general information only, e no be medical advice. Always confirm medicine details and interactions with ya pharmacist or doctor. See healthcare provider for proper diagnosis and treatment. If emergency, go hospital sharp sharp.

appointments.title: Appointment
appointments.subtitle: Find clinic and manage ya appointments
appointments.signInAppointments: Log in to see and manage ya appointments.
appointments.noAppointmentsHint: Find clinic and book your first appointment.
appointments.noClinics: No clinic match wetin you search.
appointments.reasonPlaceholder: Small talk about why you wan see doctor
appointments.disclaimer: Appointment request na for scheduling only, e no be doctor consultation. Confirm with the hospital if them available. This na general information, no be medical advice. See healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment. If emergency, go hospital sharp sharp or call 112.
appointments.adminSignInRequired: Please sign in to manage clinics.
appointments.adminClinicsSubtitle: Manage the NurseAda primary care network. Only admins can see this page.

auth.signInSubtitle: Log in to use ya NurseAda health helper
auth.signUpSubtitle: Sign up to save ya conversation and see patient record
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.confirmationSent: We don send confirmation link to <bold>{email}</bold>. Click the link make you activate ya account, then log in.
auth.signUpDisclaimer: By creating account you agree say NurseAda give general health information only, no be medical advice. Always see healthcare provider.

patient.title: Patient Profile
patient.notFoundBody: That Patient ID no match your account. Abeg open your own profile for Account.
patient.noObservations: No observation dey for this patient.
patient.noMedications: No medicine dey for this patient.
patient.noReports: No report dey for this patient.
